name: IdsEdwProvBillSvcAssocDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_src AS ( SELECT A.PROV_BILL_SVC_ASSOC_SK, A.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, A.PROV_ID, A.PROV_BILL_SVC_ID, A.EFF_DT_SK, A.PROV_BILL_SVC_SK, A.PROV_SK, A.END_DT_SK, B.PROV_BILL_SVC_NM, CM.TRGT_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_BILL_SVC_ASSOC A LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CM ON A.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CM.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_BILL_SVC B ON A.PROV_BILL_SVC_ID = B.PROV_BILL_SVC_ID ) SELECT cte_src.PROV_BILL_SVC_ASSOC_SK AS PROV_BILL_SVC_ASSOC_SK, CASE WHEN cte_src.TRGT_CD IS NULL OR dbo.trim_default(cte_src.TRGT_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_src.TRGT_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, cte_src.PROV_ID AS PROV_ID, cte_src.PROV_BILL_SVC_ID AS PROV_BILL_SVC_ID, cte_src.EFF_DT_SK AS PROV_BILL_SVC_ASSOC_EFF_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte_src.PROV_SK AS PROV_SK, cte_src.END_DT_SK AS PROV_BILL_SVC_ASSOC_END_DT_SK, cte_src.PROV_BILL_SVC_NM AS PROV_BILL_SVC_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte_src.PROV_BILL_SVC_SK AS PROV_BILL_SVC_SK FROM cte_src

Annotations:
JOB NAME: IdsEdwProvBillSvcAssocDExtr
DB2 connector brings in data from IDS table PROV_BILL_SVC_ASSOC
Data is written into a load ready SF file named as PROV_BILL_SVC_ASSOC_D.dat
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
